chart.prompt: Anteil der Versandbelege pro Carrier (shipping_method) im laufenden Monat
chart.sql_string:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(dn.shipping_method, 'Unbekannt') AS "Versandart",
  COUNT(dn.delivery_note_id) AS "Anzahl_Versandbelege"
FROM delivery_notes dn
WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', dn.date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND dn.status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created')
GROUP BY dn.shipping_method
ORDER BY COUNT(dn.delivery_note_id) DESC

en.title: Carrier mix
en.description: Share of shipments per carrier (shipping method) for the current month — see which carrier dominates and the diversification level.

de.title: Carrier-Mix
de.description: Anteil der Versandbelege pro Carrier (Versandart) im laufenden Monat — zeigt welcher Carrier dominiert und wie diversifiziert versendet wird.
